title: Panna Cotta with Kiwi Sauce
description: A creamy panna cotta topped with a sweet and tangy kiwi sauce. This Italian dessert is both refreshing and indulgent.
instructions: In a blender, puree the kiwi slices until smooth.
Strain the kiwi puree through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl to remove excess pulp.
Add the sweetener to the kiwi puree and stir to combine.
If using store-bought panna cotta, follow package instructions for thawing and serving.
If using homemade panna cotta, transfer it to individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate the panna cotta for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, top the panna cotta with the kiwi sauce and garnish with fresh mint leaves.
